description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named StyleCheck that runs on push events to all branches except dependabot/*, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has three ubuntu-latest jobs: spacing, encoding, and clang-format. The spacing job checks and fixes mixed tabs and spaces, trailing white spaces, and ensures files end with a new line. The encoding job checks and fixes file encoding to UTF-8 and line endings to LF. The clang-format job checks and fixes C++ code formatting using clang-format.
